title: Lazy Brandy Nut Pie
description: A cozy and indulgent dessert that combines the comforting flavors of nutty crust with a rich brandy filling suitable for lazy Sunday baking.
instructions: Mix almond flour, soaked and drained cashews, coconut oil, maple syrup, vanilla extract, baking powder, cayenne pepper in a large bowl until well combined.
Press mixture into a greased pie dish or springform pan. Chill the crust for at least 30 minutes before assembling filling.
In another mixing bowl, combine brandy and add a few ice cubes to chill it faster. Stir to mix evenly with the nutty filling.
Pour chilled nut filling on top of chilled crust.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until edges start to brown and center is set but still slightly jiggly.
Remove from heat immediately after baking. Let cool completely before serving.
